moq-js upstream commit:
a8ca08f19580f049d5d37244452f19f859c72e15

Local vendoring note:
- built from GitHub main
- patched video-moq to await Player.create() and bind the created player instance so built-in controls work
- copied publish-side source directories into this project: `common/`, `contribute/`, `media/`, `moq-publisher/`, `publish/`, `transport/`, `types/`
- patched `moq-publisher/index.ts` locally so its shadow-DOM controls receive stable ids and usable button labels
